title: Automated Tissue Fixation with 10% NBF (Leica)
author: Donna Skinner

steps_raw.instruction: Formalin Short Program A B C D 1 Station/Reagent Time Temp P/V 2 10% NBF 00:12 min 40 Y 3 70% Ethyl Alcohol 00:15 min 40 Y 4 95% Ethyl Alcohol 00:15 min 40 Y 5 95% Ethyl Alcohol 00:20 min 40 Y 6 100% Ethyl Alcohol 00:20 min 40 Y 7 100% Ethyl Alcohol 00:20 min 40 Y 8 Xylene 00:20 min 40 Y 9 Xylene 00:30 min 40 Y 10 Paraffin Wax 1 00:05 min 60 Y 11 Paraffin Wax 2 00:10 min 60 Y 12 Paraffin Wax 3 00:15 min 60 Y Table 1. Formalin short program.
Program the Leica ASP300 S Fully Enclosed Tissue Processor with either the short program or long program depending on size, thickness, and type of sample.

Formalin Long Program A B C D 1 Station/Reagent Time Temp P/V 2 10% NBF 02:00 hr 40 Y 3 70% Ethyl Alcohol 00:45 min 40 Y 4 95% Ethyl Alcohol 00:45 min 40 Y 5 95% Ethyl Alcohol 00:45 min 40 Y 6 100% Ethyl Alcohol 00:30 min 40 Y 7 100% Ethyl Alcohol 01:00 min 40 Y 8 100% Ethyl Alcohol 30 min 40 Y 9 Xylene 30 min 40 Y 10 Xylene 30 min 40 Y 11 Paraffin Wax 1 30 min 60 Y 12 Paraffin Wax 2 30 min 60 Y 13 Paraffin Wax 3 30 min 60 Y Table 2. Formalin long program.
